title: PDFScanInterval Property
description: Sets the scanning line pitch for PDF417 codes.
notes:
Sets the scanning line pitch for PDF417 codes. Decreasing the value increases the detection accuracy, but detection time will be longer.

Values range from 1 to height/width of the PDF417 code to be scanned.

Default: 10

See Also: PDFScanInterval Property

Vision Objects: PDFScanInterval Property

Code Reader
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Code Reader
